sections.title: Well-Covered Packages (85-95%)
sections.content:
- `internal/contract/admission` — Excellent SLA validation coverage
- `internal/human/executor` — Good coverage of call lifecycle
- `internal/model/provider` — Good provider factory and option tests
- `internal/kernel/scheduler` — Core scheduling with dependency handling

sections.title: 1. `internal/kernel/sharedlayer/state_store.go`
2. `internal/kernel/lifecycle/lifecycle.go`
3. `internal/model/tool/http_client.go`
4. `internal/model/tool/file_read.go` / `file_write.go`
5. `internal/kernel/dispatcher/dispatcher.go`
6. `internal/kernel/orchestrator/orchestrator.go`
7. `internal/kernel/scheduler/scheduler.go`
8. Integration Test Gaps
Summary of Priority Gaps
sections.content:
| Package | Gap | Priority |
|---------|-----|----------|
| `http_client.go` | 4xx/5xx response handling | High |
| `orchestrator.go` | `parseSLA` overflow, `backoffDelay` cap | High |
| `orchestrator_integration` | Graceful shutdown during execution | High |
| `scheduler.go` | Self-referential dependency | Medium |
| `dispatcher.go` | Context cancellation | Medium |
| `file_read/write.go` | Symlink traversal, empty dirs | Medium |
| `state_store.go` | Concurrent access | Low |
| `lifecycle.go` | State transitions | Low |
